title: The Tyrant Father
writer: António Lopes Ribeiro, Francisco Ribeiro, Vasco Santana
actors: Vasco Santana, Francisco Ribeiro, Leonor Maia
plot: Francisco, salesman in a shoe store, is totally in love with Tatão, which sells perfume in the same street. But he is an amateur theater actor, as she hates theater and is a fan of cinema. Will this unlikely love endure?
